CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Matter reported as settled. An Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 is set to JUL-10-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
